shortDescription.text: Detects behaviors indicative of unauthorized or malicious agent activity.

fullDescription.text: Identifies patterns such as unauthorized data access, exfiltration attempts, command and control communication, persistence mechanisms, or other actions that deviate from the expected legitimate function of an AI agent. This rule helps to distinguish between benign agent operations and potentially harmful activities.

shortDescription.text: Detects potential supply chain integrity issues.

fullDescription.text: Identifies discrepancies in metadata, conflicting source repositories, or inconsistent file paths that could indicate repackaging, misconfiguration, or an attempt to obscure the true origin of a skill. Such ambiguities can lead to users inadvertently installing a modified or untrusted version of the skill, posing a supply chain risk.
